text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Fan Fest—a huge event wherein
Tracen Academy opens its doors to fans of all
ages.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What's more, they'll be treated to a sport
competition between the academy's Umamusume
that outsiders don't usually get to witness.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's gonna be a ball game competition, huh? I'm
in! Say, Trainer? Do you know what the biggest
ball sport out there is?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nope! Golf! I mean, soccer's fine and all, but
golf's the way to go! And with that said...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be the star today! I'm gonna take
charge like nobody's business!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The golfing competition is taking place on the
turf track, which has been temporarily
transformed into a golf course.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ I've never played golf before, but I bet I
look more like a golfer than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
For my second shot... Maybe I'll use the 6 iron?
Never mind, the 1 wood's the way to go.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you're using a 1? But this isn't your tee
shot.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'd feel like I'd lost to myself if I used anything
else other than number one, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Here I go! Line up the shot just right... and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ei, ei, muuun!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! They're already at it! I'd better get
swinging too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the competition continues, Mejiro Palmer does
well in the match play competition and makes it
to the final hole with a chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's see, looks like my opponent'll be...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Let us have fun, Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon, hmm? A front runner just like
me, but...
choice_data_list:
Your running styles are complete opposites,
huh?

Your running styles are complete opposites,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a race, Mejiro Palmer explodes to the front
when her gut says to go, but Mihono Bourbon
calculates every detail down to the second for her
breakaways.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a veritable clash between emotion and logic
on the golf course. Which will emerge victorious?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Measurements complete. Wind determined to be
blowing north by northwest at 3.8 meters per
second.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A slice should land the ball within 0.52 meters
from the bunker.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Changing directives from standby to swing
preparation. Three, two, one! Hup!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wooow... Who'd've thunk there was an
Umamusume who could hit that kinda shot?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: She might actually give me a run for my money!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(My turn... The course is clear, and I'm in the
zone. All I need now are some victory vibes!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I can't disappoint everyone who's rooting for
me!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Huh? I thought there'd more eyes be on me, but I
hardly sense anyone watching the match. Maybe
it's just a low turnout from my fans...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I guess Umamusume golf isn't that big of a hit.
Oh well!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's get liiit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I chunked it! Nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Oooooh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer failed to get a good read on the
wind. As a result...

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text: The winner is Mihono Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Man, you got me good. Congrats, Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That was amazing. Do you run that precisely in
your races too?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. However, I must confess something.
During today's golf match...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I copied your form.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wha? Huh? You did?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. Every shot you made was well
deliberated and highly rational. In fact...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I analyzed your races a little as well. The guts you
display on the final stretch of your races are
particularly impressive.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have a request. Please continue to exemplify
your flawless running from here on out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I didn't know you even did research on
other racers' running styles.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No wonder I lost to you today. I've learned a lot
from you. Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We should have a rematch one day! But just so
you know, I'm not gonna lose to you, either on
the track or the green!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Acknowledged. I await the day with eager
anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she lost, Mejiro Palmer learns some
valuable lessons from competing against a front
runner with a different running style.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: We've got your back! Just focus on your shot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look around and notice the crowd of people
rooting for Mejiro Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surrounded by an army of fans with all their
fingers crossed for luck, Mejiro Palmer brings her
club back, and...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Here we go! Let's get liiit!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hits the perfect shot! The ball travels in a
beautiful arc and disappears from sight as if
swallowed by the sky itself. As a result...

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text: The winner is Mejiro Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I did it, Trainer! I dunno why, but I felt so
confident and secure, like I had a bunch of
people backing me up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, when'd the crowd on my side get this
big?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A group of fans all wearing the same button
badge on their chests gather around us.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Mejiro Palmer! We're your own
personal fan club!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we're Palmie's Army! Everyone here loves
how you run!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Palmie's Army! I can't believe I've reached the
point where people are forming clubs for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm so grateful to my fans! Even better...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: They're not "Mejiro" fans—they're here for me!
choice_data_list: Yeah! They're your very own cheer squad!
Yeah! They're your very own cheer squad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems people have been inspired by Mejiro
Palmer's persistence as she chases after true
freedom. Her hard work has resulted in a devoted
following, and a big one at that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, everybody! Golf is one thing, but to hype
all of you up even more on the track...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm shooting for a hole-in-one at the spring Tenno
Sho! Waheeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can feel the strong bond that has formed
between Mejiro Palmer and her fans as the latter
cheer and applaud for her with great enthusiasm.
